[WebPlugIn](/documentation/ObjectiveC/webplugin)The `WebPlugIn` informal protocol defines methods that enable interaction between an application using the WebKit framework and any WebKit-based plug-ins it may use.[WebPlugInContainer](/documentation/ObjectiveC/webplugincontainer)`WebPlugInContainer` is an informal protocol that enables a plug-in to send messages to the application.
